claim: Building production-grade agents requires tackling three challenges: framework fragmentation, inter-agent communication, and operational governance (monitoring, logging, cost control)
actionable: When productionizing agents, invest in: (1) unified agent framework, (2) agent-to-agent protocol, (3) observability platform for governance and cost tracking.
source_title: Building AI agents with Claude in Google Cloud's Vertex AI | Code w/ Claude

claim: MCP (Model Context Protocol) standardizes how LLMs access tools and context, enabling agents to seamlessly consume tools across frameworks without reinventing integrations
actionable: Adopt MCP-compatible tools and servers in your agent stack to avoid lock-in and enable tool reuse across Claude, Gemini, and other LLM-powered agents.
source_title: Building AI agents with Claude in Google Cloud's Vertex AI | Code w/ Claude

claim: Agent Development Kit (ADK) enables minimal boilerplate to build agents: define name, model, instructions, and tools, then use CLI (adk run) or web UI to test iteratively
actionable: Use ADK-like frameworks that separate agent logic from infrastructure; iterate on agents with reusable prompts and tools before deploying to production platforms.
source_title: Building AI agents with Claude in Google Cloud's Vertex AI | Code w/ Claude

claim: Multi-agent orchestration simplifies complex workflows by routing requests to specialized agents (e.g., birthday planner + calendar scheduler) through a coordinator agent
actionable: Break complex tasks into specialized sub-agents; use an orchestrator agent to route requests and manage multi-agent conversations.
source_title: Building AI agents with Claude in Google Cloud's Vertex AI | Code w/ Claude

claim: Managed agent platforms (e.g., Vertex AI Agent Engine) handle operational complexity: monitoring, logging, observability, evaluation, and deployment at scale without manual infrastructure
actionable: Deploy agents to managed platforms that handle observability, cost tracking, and evaluation; avoid building custom monitoring infrastructure.
source_title: Building AI agents with Claude in Google Cloud's Vertex AI | Code w/ Claude

claim: Agent-to-Agent Protocol (A2A) enables cross-framework agent collaboration using HTTP, JSON-RPC, and identity metadata; agents become composable building blocks
actionable: For multi-framework agent systems, adopt agent-to-agent protocols that standardize communication; this enables agents built with different frameworks to collaborate.
source_title: Building AI agents with Claude in Google Cloud's Vertex AI | Code w/ Claude
